AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOLDA,ZYGMUNT DBA HOLDA WASHER&DRYER REPAIR SERVIC AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO, JORGE LUIS MALDONADO, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLDA,ZYGMUNT DBA HOLDA WASHER&DRYER REPAIR SERVIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALDONADO, JORGE LUIS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.00, PARTIES SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO PAY AT LEAST $100 EVERY 2 WKS COMMENCING 2/21/95 BY MONEY ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. MAILING DATE IS DECEMBER 11, 1996.
